# Move Different Logistics Ltd

> Kenya-based asset-light SME logistics company offering freight forwarding, customs clearance, warehousing and last-mile delivery across East Africa.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services and company.
- [About](/about): Company background, mission and values.
- [Services](/services): Air freight, sea freight, customs clearance, inland transport, warehousing, last-mile delivery and more.
- [Partners](/partners): Network of shipping lines, airlines and local providers.
- [Buy & Ship](/buy-and-ship): Cargo consolidation and door-to-door delivery from China, USA, UK, UAE and India.
- [Contact](/contact): Get a quote or speak with the logistics team.

## Contact

- Phone: +254 798 852 545
- Email: logistics@movedifferent.co.ke
- Location: Nairobi, Kenya
